CustomField.description: Defines the naming pattern for the Household Account Name field. Uses merge field tokens like {!LastName} {!FirstName}. Example format: "The {!LastName} Household" produces "The Smith Household." Only applies when Automatic Household Naming is enabled. Contacts sharing a last name are combined automatically.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Naming pattern for Household Account Names. Uses tokens like {!LastName}. Example: "The {!LastName} Household."
CustomField.label: Household Name Format
